commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=bf0679884daa260bfb661f56a54b621b1ad490be)
commands.review_summary:
The PR suppresses late text-only failed tool output after final Telegram/Discord message-tool-only delivery while preserving compact progress, media, and exec approval payloads.

Reproducibility: Partially: the current-main leak path and the PR-introduced non-send message-tool suppression path are source-reproducible from the dispatch and tool contracts. I did not run tests or a live channel repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The branch needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for the delivery-gating defect plus real transport proof, so it is not a safe automated repair lane candidate.

target.title: fix(channels): suppress late raw tool output
target.body:
## Summary
- Keeps failed tool-call status visible through the compact progress/item callbacks for message-tool-only channel replies, while suppressing raw text-only failed tool-result payloads that were escaping as separate messages.
- Stops Telegram and Discord progress drafts/tool payloads from accepting late text-only updates after the final answer has been delivered.
- Preserves media tool results and exec approval payloads so real attachment/approval flows are not hidden by the suppression.

## Root Cause
Before/RCA proof:
- Parent-source proof: before this patch, `src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts` suppressed default tool progress only when `!hasMedia && !hasExecApproval && deliveryPayload.isError !== true`. Exact inspection command: `git show HEAD^:src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts | sed -n '1615,1675p'`. That condition explicitly let text-only failed tool results bypass the compact-progress suppression path.
- Regression trigger proof: `57da466ecbb5f63b5a1881ae8caa7359c02ec40c` (`Fix Discord verbose tool progress delivery (#80042)`, merged May 17, 2026) changed source-suppressed verbose progress from direct-chat-only to `sourceReplyDeliveryMode === "message_tool_only"`. That correctly restored compact verbose progress for channel replies, but it also made the older `isError` bypass visible in Telegram/Discord message-tool-only turns.
- Late-tail proof: Discord's generic fallback final-delivery branch marked the reply sent but did not mark the draft preview as final-delivered, while Telegram's tool/progress paths accepted text-only tool updates after the answer lane was finalized. That let asynchronous failed command output update or restart progress after the final chat message.
- Scope proof: the leak is shared dispatch/subscription behavior plus Telegram and Discord adapter finalization, not a Telegram-only issue.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Failed tool calls still appear in the compact progress state, but raw failed tool-output text no longer dumps after the final Telegram/Discord channel reply.

Real environment tested: Local tmp worktree branch `fix-channel-late-tool-output` at `bf0679884daa` rebased onto `origin/main` `d0f7c8fa280534c3be786fd1ec69b569bbd72200`; private Telegram/Discord identifiers from the reported session were intentionally not included in this public PR.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.draft-preview.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-pi-session.suppresses-message-end-block-replies-message-tool.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.types.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-pi-session.suppresses-message-end-block-replies-message-tool.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts`

Evidence after fix:
- `oxfmt`: `All matched files use the correct format. Finished in 45ms on 13 files using 1 threads.`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`: no output.
- Vitest: `Test Files 6 passed (6); Tests 398 passed (398); Duration 13.12s`.
- New shared dispatch coverage proves `onCommandOutput` still receives the compact failed `exec` status while raw `sendToolResult` does not receive `raw failed command output` in `message_tool_only` mode.
- New embedded subscription coverage proves text-only tool summaries after committed message-tool delivery are suppressed.
- New Discord coverage proves the progress draft shows the pre-final compact `Exec` state and is not updated by late failed command output after final delivery.
- New Telegram coverage proves post-final text-only tool payloads are suppressed and command-output callbacks do not restart progress drafts after the final answer.

Observed result after fix: Compact failed-tool progress remains available before/finalizing the answer, and late raw text-only failed tool payloads are dropped after final delivery; media payloads and exec approval payloads remain deliverable.

What was not tested: Live Telegram/Discord E2E posting with real accounts was not run from this tmp worktree to avoid touching private reported channels. The requested Codex review pass was attempted with both `codex review --uncommitted` and the skill wrapper; both failed before diff inspection with local `bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted`, so no review finding was accepted as proof.

## Verification
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 <13 touched files>`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-pi-session.suppresses-message-end-block-replies-message-tool.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts`

## What was not tested
Live Telegram/Discord E2E with real accounts/channels was not run; this PR uses source-level RCA plus focused shared, Discord, and Telegram regression tests as the proof path.
